message:
test: Add 54 unit tests to improve coverage (bd-pacy)

Add comprehensive unit tests for utility functions:

rch/src/main.rs:
- Add 8 tests for machine_output_requested and resolve_output_format

rch-common/src/ui/progress/transfer.rs:
- Add 19 tests for SpeedSmoother, TransferDirection, parse_progress_line

rch-common/src/ui/progress/celebrate.rs:
- Add 17 tests for format_duration_ms, format_bytes, format_ordinal,
  truncate_line, star_icon, CelebrationSummary builder

rch-common/src/ui/progress/pipeline.rs:
- Add 10 tests for PipelineStage labels, StageStatus, format_duration,
  PipelineProgress construction

Coverage improved from ~68.74% to ~71.54%, approaching 75% target.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
